---
title: "Gallery"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "On this page"
    toc-location: left
    toc-depth: 2
    lightbox: auto
---

## Family & Friends

::: {layout-ncol="4"}
![Grandma on a picnic day](photos/grandma_flowers.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![W Amy at bubble tea store](photos/amy_tastea.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![Amy with a parfait on her birthday](photos/amy_bday.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![W Amy at Grebel graduation](photos/amy_grebel.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![Mel w a smile](photos/mel_smile.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![Mel looking professional and sharp](photos/mel_professional.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![Mel w flowers](photos/mel_flowers.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![Mel in a blue dress shirt](photos/mel_blueshirt.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}
:::

::: {layout-ncol="3"}
![Thao](photos/thao_1.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![Amy + Thao + Min](photos/amy_thao_min.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![W Darley at Grebel graduation](photos/darley_grebel.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![Family photo at Grebel graduation](photos/family_grebel.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![W Mom at UW graduation](photos/uw_graduation_mom.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![W Mom at Grebel graduation](photos/mom_grebel.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}
:::

::: {layout-ncol="3"}
![Uncle Dongho](photos/uncle_dongho.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![Baby me!](photos/baby_min.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![Mom](photos/mom_baby_min.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![Dad](photos/dad_baby_min.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}

![Grandma](photos/grandma_baby_min.jpg){group="family" loading="lazy"}
:::

## Day-to-day Life

::: {layout-ncol="4"}
![Me holding sunflowers for mom](photos/min_flowers.jpg){group="daily" loading="lazy"}

![Me standing in front of my building](photos/min_57queen.jpg){group="daily" loading="lazy"}

![Me eating Thao's dumplings](photos/dumpling.jpg){group="daily" loading="lazy"}

![Rock climbing 2](photos/rock_climbing2.jpg){group="daily" loading="lazy"}

![Quebec city](photos/quebec_city.jpg){group="daily" loading="lazy"}

![Rock climbing](photos/rock_climbing.jpg){group="daily" loading="lazy"}

![Narcan sign on my backpack!](photos/naloxone_backpack.jpg){group="daily" loading="lazy"}
:::

## Academic Life

::: {layout-ncol="3"}
![The 50th CMESG - sunset during excursion](photos/cmesg26_sky.jpg){group="academic" loading="lazy"}

![The 50th CMESG - messages on a giant piece of paper](photos/cmesg26_notes.jpg){group="academic" loading="lazy"}

![A shape built with math manipulatives](photos/math_manipulative_1.jpg){group="academic" loading="lazy"}

![CAEH24 - group photo](photos/caeh_1.jpg){group="academic" loading="lazy"}

![CAEH24 presentation](photos/caeh_presentation.jpg){group="academic" loading="lazy"}

![2024 CMESG annual meeting](photos/cmesg_2024.jpg){group="academic" loading="lazy"}

![Me at 2024 CMESG annual meeting](photos/me_cmesg.jpg){group="academic" loading="lazy"}

![Me at Grebel graduation](photos/min_grebel.jpg){group="academic" loading="lazy"}

![Poster presentation session](photos/poster_presentation.jpg){group="academic" loading="lazy"}
:::

## Musical Life

::: {layout-ncol="4"}
![Practice session for the concerto competition](photos/great_hall.jpg){group="music" loading="lazy"}

![Practice session at a grand piano](photos/grand_piano_1.jpg){group="music" loading="lazy"}

![Orchestra practice](photos/orchestra_practice.jpg){group="music" loading="lazy"}

![Practice session for a performance](photos/practice_1.jpg){group="music" loading="lazy"}

![Orchestra concert](photos/orchestra_concert.jpg){group="music" loading="lazy"}

![Me with viola case](photos/min_viola_case.jpg){group="music" loading="lazy"}

![Mini metronome](photos/metronome.jpg){group="music" loading="lazy"}
:::

## Toto & Nana

::: {layout-ncol="4"}
![Bedside Toto](photos/toto_3.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Nana showing her belly](photos/nana_8.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Toto at a beach](photos/toto_6.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Nana reaching out a paw](photos/nana_7.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Toto leaning against me and sofa](photos/toto_5.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Nana staring at moving laser](photos/nana_6.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Toto with his bed and toys](photos/toto_4.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Nana sitting on a digital piano bench](photos/nana_5.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Toto + Nana](photos/toto_nana1.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Kitten Nana](photos/nana_4.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Toto with a slipper](photos/toto_2.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Nana in Toto's bed](photos/nana_3.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Toto under the sunlight](photos/toto_1.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Nana on a couch](photos/nana_2.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}

![Nana in a grocery bag](photos/nana_1.jpg){group="pets" loading="lazy"}
:::

## Food

::: {layout-ncol="4"}
![Coffee w a friend (no person in the frame)](photos/coffee_with_itman.jpg){group="food" loading="lazy"}

![Dad's pork cutlet](photos/pork_cutlet.jpg){group="food" loading="lazy"}

![Jjolmyeon](photos/jjolmyeon.jpg){group="food" loading="lazy"}

![Homemade sushi](photos/sushi.jpg){group="food" loading="lazy"}
:::

## Inspirations

![Zinnia on Stage](photos/rachael_stage.jpg){group="inspiration" loading="lazy"}
